# endObservingDirectory(at:)

**Instance Method**

Tells the extension that the user has stopped looking at a monitored directory or at one of its subdirectories.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func endObservingDirectory(at url: URL)
```

## Parameters

- **url**: The URL of the directory.

## Discussion

Override this method to receive notifications when the user is no longer looking at the contents of the given URL. As with [doc://com.apple.Finder-Sync/documentation/FinderSync/FIFinderSyncProtocol/beginObservingDirectory(at:)], the Open and Save dialogs are tracked separately from the Finder.

## Managing Badges, Shortcut Menus, and Toolbar Buttons

- **beginObservingDirectory(at:)**: Tells the extension that the user is looking at a monitored directory or at one of its subdirectories.
- **menu(for:)**: Requests a custom menu from the extension.
- **requestBadgeIdentifier(for:)**: Requests a badge for the given file or directory.
- **toolbarItemImage**: The image for the extension’s toolbar button.
- **toolbarItemName**: The name of the extension’s toolbar button.
- **toolbarItemToolTip**: The tooltip text for the extension’s toolbar button.
